# Epic Survival Game 3D

## Project Type
- 3D Browser-based Survival Adventure Game
- Built with Three.js + Vite

## Tech Stack
- **Renderer**: Three.js (WebGL 3D)
- **Build Tool**: Vite
- **Language**: JavaScript (ES Modules)
- **Audio**: Web Audio API

## Project Structure
- `src/` - Source code
  - `main.js` - Entry point
  - `game/` - Game logic
  - `world/` - World generation
  - `entities/` - Players, enemies
  - `systems/` - Game systems (inventory, crafting, combat)
  - `ui/` - HUD and menus
  - `audio/` - Sound management
  - `utils/` - Utilities
- `public/` - Static assets
- `index.html` - Entry HTML

## Development
- `npm run dev` - Start dev server
- `npm run build` - Build for production
